query:
INSERT INTO person_scene_visit (
                    person_uuid,
                    scene_uuid,
                    first_visited_at,
                    last_visited_at,
                    visit_count,
                    created_at,
                    updated_at
                )
                VALUES ($1::UUID, $2::UUID, NOW(), NOW(), 1, NOW(), NOW())
                ON CONFLICT (person_uuid, scene_uuid)
                DO UPDATE
                SET last_visited_at = NOW(),
                    visit_count = person_scene_visit.visit_count + 1,
                    updated_at = NOW();
